description_long: This object is a vertical speed limit sign featuring a circular white face bordered in red, with the number '20' prominently displayed in black, indicating a speed limit of 20 kilometers per hour. The sign face is mounted atop a long, slender, cylindrical pole, which appears to be made of metal and is painted a dark color. The sign face is rectangular with rounded corners and is affixed securely to the pole with a visible mounting bracket at the back. The pole is of standard height, suitable for visibility to both drivers and pedestrians in urban environments. The materials suggest durability and weather resistance, typical for outdoor traffic signage. No additional features, decorations, or environmental context are visible around the sign.
description: A metal speed limit sign with a white face, red border, and '20' in black, mounted on a tall, dark cylindrical pole.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the rectangular sign plate and the full length of the supporting pole.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the sign plate and the straight, cylindrical pole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the '20' speed limit in black within a red-bordered white circle on the sign face.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile of the sign and pole.
